mission.title: vitess: Make emergency reparents more robust.
mission.description: Make emergency reparents more robust.. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current vitess deployment
steps.description:
Verify your vtctldclient --version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
helm list -n vitess 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working vitess installation.

steps.title: Review vitess configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant vitess configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl get configmap -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=vitess
```
We previously did a lot of work to make TabletExternallyReparented and PlannedReparentShard more robust (#5151, #5172, #5391). We plan to do the same for EmergencyReparentShard (ERS) next.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Make emergency reparents more robust.
steps.description:
This PR:
1. Adds fields to the `SlaveStatus` struct to pull in the `RelayLogPosition` which maps to the retrieved GTIDSet in the MySQL case.
2. Adds `FilePosition` and `FileRelayLogPosition` fields for all flavors as a fall back.
3. Adds `MasterServerId` field. We will need to retrieve this for finding errant GTIDs in next PR.
4. Adds `Comparable` method and `AllPositionsComparable` function to determine if a list of positions are all comparable with another list of positions.

Related Issue:

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n vitess -l app.kubernetes.io/name=vitess
kubectl get events -n vitess --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Make emergency reparents more robust." is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This PR:
1. Adds fields to the `SlaveStatus` struct to pull in the `RelayLogPosition` which maps to the retrieved GTIDSet in the MySQL case.
2. Adds `FilePosition` and `FileRelayLogPosition` fields for all flavors as a fall back.
3. Adds `MasterServerId` field. We will need to retrieve this for finding errant GTIDs in next PR.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with vitess installed or the issue environment reproducible.
